testcase.name: Get all booking IDs
testcase.system-out: Given the API base URL is configured........................................passed And I am authenticated with valid credentials...............................passed When I send a GET request to "/booking".....................................passed Then the response status code should be 200.................................passed And the response should return a list of booking IDs........................passed

testcase.name: Get bookings filtered by first name
testcase.system-out: Given the API base URL is configured........................................passed And I am authenticated with valid credentials...............................passed When I send a GET request to "/booking" with query param "firstname" as "Jim".passed Then the response status code should be 200.................................passed And the response should return a list of booking IDs........................passed

testcase.name: Get bookings filtered by check-in date
testcase.system-out: Given the API base URL is configured........................................passed And I am authenticated with valid credentials...............................passed When I send a GET request to "/booking" with query param "checkin" as "2024-01-01".passed Then the response status code should be 200.................................passed And the response should return a list of booking IDs........................passed

testcase.name: Get a specific booking by ID
testcase.system-out: Given the API base URL is configured........................................passed And I am authenticated with valid credentials...............................passed Given a booking exists......................................................passed When I send a GET request to the booking....................................passed Then the response status code should be 200.................................passed And the booking response should have "firstname" as "James".................passed And the booking response should have "lastname" as "Brown"..................passed

testcase.name: Get booking with non-existent ID

failure.message: Cannot invoke "io.restassured.response.Response.getStatusCode()" because the return value of "com.booker.utils.ScenarioContext.getLastResponse()" is null

testcase.failure: java.lang.NullPointerException: Cannot invoke "io.restassured.response.Response.getStatusCode()" because the return value of "com.booker.utils.ScenarioContext.getLastResponse()" is null at com.booker.stepdefs.AuthSteps.theResponseStatusCodeShouldBe(AuthSteps.java:87) at ✽.the response status code should be 404(file:///E:/Softwares/restful-booker-automation/restful-booker-automation/src/test/resources/features/booking.feature:44)
testcase.system-out: Given the API base URL is configured........................................passed And I am authenticated with valid credentials...............................passed Then the response status code should be 404.................................failed

testcase.name: Create a new booking with all fields
testcase.system-out: Given the API base URL is configured........................................passed And I am authenticated with valid credentials...............................passed When I create a booking with the following details:.........................passed Then the response status code should be 200.................................passed And the response should contain a booking ID................................passed And the booking firstname should be "James".................................passed And the booking lastname should be "Brown"..................................passed

testcase.name: Create a booking without additional needs
testcase.system-out: Given the API base URL is configured........................................passed And I am authenticated with valid credentials...............................passed When I create a booking with the following details:.........................passed Then the response status code should be 200.................................passed And the response should contain a booking ID................................passed

testcase.name: Create booking with missing required fields
testcase.system-out: Given the API base URL is configured........................................passed And I am authenticated with valid credentials...............................passed When I send an invalid POST request to "/booking" with body:................passed Then the response status code should be 500.................................passed

testcase.name: Update an existing booking fully
testcase.system-out: Given the API base URL is configured........................................passed And I am authenticated with valid credentials...............................passed Given a booking exists......................................................passed When I update the booking with the following details:.......................passed Then the response status code should be 200.................................passed And the booking firstname should be "Updated"...............................passed

testcase.name: Update booking without auth token
testcase.system-out: Given the API base URL is configured........................................passed And I am authenticated with valid credentials...............................passed Given a booking exists......................................................passed When I update the booking without authentication............................passed Then the response status code should be 403.................................passed

testcase.name: Partially update a booking's first name
testcase.system-out: Given the API base URL is configured........................................passed And I am authenticated with valid credentials...............................passed Given a booking exists......................................................passed When I partially update the booking with:...................................passed Then the response status code should be 200.................................passed And the booking firstname should be "Patched"...............................passed

testcase.name: Partial update without auth token
testcase.system-out: Given the API base URL is configured........................................passed And I am authenticated with valid credentials...............................passed Given a booking exists......................................................passed When I partially update the booking without authentication..................passed Then the response status code should be 403.................................passed

testcase.name: Delete an existing booking
testcase.system-out: Given the API base URL is configured........................................passed And I am authenticated with valid credentials...............................passed Given a booking exists......................................................passed When I delete the booking...................................................passed Then the response status code should be 201.................................passed

testcase.name: Delete a booking without auth token
testcase.system-out: Given the API base URL is configured........................................passed And I am authenticated with valid credentials...............................passed Given a booking exists......................................................passed When I delete the booking without authentication............................passed Then the response status code should be 403.................................passed

testcase.name: Delete non-existent booking
testcase.system-out: Given the API base URL is configured........................................passed And I am authenticated with valid credentials...............................passed When I delete booking with ID 9999999.......................................passed Then the response status code should be 405.................................passed
